name: appium-flutter-mcp
description: MCP server for driving Flutter (and hybrid Flutter + WebView + Native) apps via Appium and the appium-flutter-integration-driver.

scripts.test: echo "No tests yet — see CONTRIBUTING.md" && exit 0
scripts.inspector: npm run build && cp -r src/inspector/renderer dist/inspector/ && cp src/inspector/preload.cjs dist/inspector/ && electron dist/inspector/main.js
scripts.inspector:dev: tsc && cp -r src/inspector/renderer dist/inspector/ && cp src/inspector/preload.cjs dist/inspector/ && electron dist/inspector/main.js

author: Ajmal Mohammed
